_strategy: R5: 1 confirmed +1 (s02+s03 frontend+checkout PodFailure PAIR — same pattern as R4 ad+frontend pair). NetworkDelay R4 winner failed to repeat 2 times. Hypothesis: otel-demo detector specifically lights on 2-service-down pairs (i.e. broader cascade), not single chaos. R6 strategy: (1) Aggressive PAIR coverage of primary path 2-service combos. (2) Use shorter durations (5 min) since longer doesn't change signal but slows iteration. (3) Try ContainerKill (different mech). (4) Test frontend solo as control.
_results: 1/5 +1 (u07 currency solo PodFailure5min — NEW WINNER). 4/5 -1 (u01 frontend solo, u02 checkout solo, u03+u04 payment+ad PAIR, u05 shipping solo). 4 submit-fail: u06 wrong app name (productcatalog vs product-catalog), u08-u10 ContainerKill on otel-demo0 bootstrap-empty. **Signal**: solo PodFailure on hot services -1; pair PodFailure DID NOT repeat (R4/R5 ad+frontend, frontend+checkout pairs were +1, R6 payment+ad pair was -1). New winner: currency solo. Lesson: detector signal tied to specific service+timing, not general chaos topology.

candidates._failure: App name wrong: 'productcatalog' should be 'product-catalog' (with dash). otel-demo upstream uses kebab-case for multi-word services.

candidates._outcome: NEW WINNER: currency/PodFailure solo (5min). currency is on primary order path (price calc); detector senses currency outage.
